text_original: Great app. I am truly enjoying it. While there are opportunities to spend money, its your choice, as the app is great either way.
text_zh: 非常棒的应用。我真的很喜欢它。虽然有需要花钱的地方，但全凭个人选择，因为无论如何这款应用都很棒。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! Thank you so much for your kind words and for appreciating our balance with monetization. We want Fantasia to be a wonderful experience for everyone, whether you choose to spend or not. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的消息，我们整个团队今天都开心极了！非常感谢您的暖心话语，以及对我们在商业化平衡方面所做努力的认可。我们希望 Fantasia 能为每个人都带来美妙的体验，无论您是否选择消费。如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。
